title: TENPLAY Ultra-Lightweight Collapsible Camping Stool,Footstool,Portable0.76KG,Heavy-Duty Capacity 150KG for Adults,Wear-Resistant,Non-Slip,Folding Oversize Seat for Hiking,Picnic,Fishing,Hunting(BLACK)
features: 🔹 【ALL-IN-ONE & PORTABLE COMPACT DESIGN】✅This innovative camping stool features an all-in-one design that combines a seat and storage bag in one unit. It unfolds to a spacious 37 × 47 × 34 cm, and folds down to a compact 21 × 37.5 × 7 cm. When not in use, it fits easily in your backpack or can be carried by hand. ✅No extra bags.The streamlined, minimalist design is perfect for hiking, camping, fishing, or travel, offering ultimate convenience without taking up space.Ideal for hiking, camping and traveling,fishing,hunting.

🔹【OVERSIZED SEAT & SUPERIOR COMFORT】 ✅Designed for adults and long-term use, this stool features a extra-wide 37 × 47 cm seat is over 40% larger than standard stools, offering extra room and stability for users of all body types. ✅Made with double-layer 600D Oxford fabric and padded with pearl cotton which is wear-resistant.The seat is soft, breathable, and slightly elastic — providing comfort without sagging, even after hours of sitting.✅The ergonomic micro-arc design evenly distributes body pressure and supports proper posture, making it ideal for fishing, outdoor events, or long queues.

🔹 【DURABLE FRAME & STABLE SUPPORT】✅Built with a premium 7075 aluminium frame and reinforced nylon joints, this stool offers exceptional strength and wobble-free stability. The square-shaped structure combined with an anti-slip four-leg design ensures a firm grip on various terrains — from grass to gravel.✅Each leg is equipped with non-slip foot covers, while the triangular support system further enhances balance and load-bearing. ✅Despite weighing only 0.76 kg (1.7 lbs), it can hold up to 150 kg (330 lbs) — this stool is built to accommodate users of various sizes.

🔹 【VERSATILE FOR ANY ENVIRONMENT】✅Ideal for outdoor use—camping, hiking, fishing, picnics, beach days—or for indoor needs like offices, dorms, or gardening. Consistently praised in similar benchmarks for being lightweight, easy to assemble, and very functional

🔹 【INSTALLATION TIP】✅When attaching the final leg, please pull the ring firmly to secure the frame. The seat fabric is intentionally designed to be tight to ensure long-term durability and prevent sagging — a firm pull will help you complete the setup with ease.
description: Product Description 1.The camping stool is made of double-layer 600D Oxford fabric and laminated with pearl cotton. Its surface is fine, soft and has moderate elasticity. 2.The precise interlocking structure of the aluminum alloy frame and the nylon triangular components ensures stability without shaking PRODUCT SIZE Expanded Size：47*37*34cm（18.5*14.6*13.4inch） Storage Size:21*37.5cm（8.27*14.76inch） Weight：0.76kg/1.68LBS Load capacity：150kg/330LBS High quality 600D oxford cloth Non-slip foot mat With carrying handle Nylon reinforced triangle
